sections.title: 🎯 Goals
sections.content:
# Project Goals

> **Mission:** Build a spec-driven AI coding assistant that turns natural language into production-ready software.

---

## Primary Goals

### 1. Spec-First Development
Establish specifications as the single source of truth. Code is generated from specs, not the other way around.

- [x] Define AutoDown specification language
- [ ] Implement spec-to-code pipeline
- [ ] Add drift detection between spec and implementation

### 2. Multi-Modal AI Interface
Support streaming, thinking mode, and tool use across multiple model providers.

- [x] Streaming chat with markdown rendering
- [x] Thinking mode toggle
- [ ] Multi-provider model switching
- [ ] Tool calling framework

### 3. Living Documentation
Specs stay in sync with code through automated verification.

- [ ] Drift check engine
- [ ] Auto-update specs from code changes
- [ ] Versioned spec history

---

## Milestones

| Milestone | Target Date | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| v0.1 MVP — Chat + Specs | 2026-05-15 | 🟡 In Progress |
| v0.2 — Tool Use + Agents | 2026-06-01 | ⚪ Planned |
| v0.3 — Code Generation | 2026-06-15 | ⚪ Planned |
| v1.0 — Production Ready | 2026-07-01 | ⚪ Planned |

---

## Success Metrics

| Metric | Target | Current |
|--------|--------|---------|
| Session retention | >60% | — |
| Spec drift detected | <5% | — |
| AI response accuracy | >90% | — |
| Time to first spec | <5 min | — |

---

> ⚠️ **Risk:** AI model availability and rate limits may affect streaming reliability. Fallback to local models should be implemented by v0.2.

sections.title: 🏗️ Architecture
sections.content:
# Architecture

## System Components

- **Frontend** — Vue 3 + markstream-vue for streaming markdown rendering
- **Backend** — Rust (axum) serving REST API + WebSocket for chat streaming
- **AI Bridge** — Modular provider interface (OpenAI, Anthropic, local models)
- **Spec Engine** — AutoDown parser + validator + drift detector

## Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|------------|
| Frontend | Vue 3, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS |
| Backend | Rust, axum, tokio |
| AI | OpenAI API, Anthropic API, Ollama |
| Specs | AutoDown (markdown extension) |

sections.title: 🎨 Designs
sections.content:
# Designs

## User Flows

1. User opens AutoForge → sees project dashboard
2. User creates a new Forge session → chat panel opens
3. User asks AI to generate specs → AI writes AutoDown
4. User reviews specs in Specs panel → edits or approves
5. User triggers code generation → AI produces code
6. User runs drift check → specs vs code comparison

## Wireframes

```
+------------------------------------------+
|  AutoForge  v0.1.0        [Settings]     |
+----------+-------------------------------+
|          |                               |
|  Chats |  Specs                        |
|  (Chat)  |  (Specs)                      |
|          |                               |
|  [List]  |  [Section Nav] | [Editor]     |
|          |                               |
+----------+-------------------------------+
```

## Functional Requirements

- [ ] Collapsible sidebars with independent state
- [ ] Real-time streaming chat with markdown
- [ ] Spec editor with View/Edit toggle
- [ ] Drag-and-drop spec sections

sections.title: 📅 Plans
sections.content:
# Plans

## Phase 1: Foundation (v0.1)

- [x] Chat interface with streaming
- [x] Session management (create, list, delete)
- [x] Spec viewer with markstream-vue
- [x] View/Edit toggle for specs
- [ ] Drift check engine
- [ ] AI Enrich action

## Phase 2: Intelligence (v0.2)

- [ ] Tool calling framework
- [ ] Multi-provider model switching
- [ ] Spec-to-code generation
- [ ] Agent workflows

## Phase 3: Scale (v0.3)

- [ ] Team collaboration (shared projects)
- [ ] Versioned spec history
- [ ] CI/CD integration
- [ ] Self-hosting package

## Phase 4: Production (v1.0)

- [ ] Security audit
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Documentation completeness
- [ ] Community plugins

sections.title: 🧪 Tests
sections.content:
## Tests

<!-- Tests define how we prove each Requirement is correct.
     Every Requirement MUST have at least one associated Test.
     Tests are drafted during SpecDraft (Gate 2) and implemented during Execution (Gate 4).
-->

### S1.1 [R1.1] <test title>
**Status:** Draft
**Type:** Unit / Integration / E2E / Contract / Performance / Fuzz
**Scope:** R1.1

**Fixture:**
```
<!-- Setup code, mocks, test data -->
```

**Steps:**
1. <imperative action>
2. <imperative action>
3. <imperative action>

**Expected Outcome:**
<!-- Unambiguous result that a human or AI can verify -->

**Test File:** `<path-to-test-file>`

**Depends on:** R1.1

sections.title: 📝 Reviews
sections.content:
# Reviews

## Code Review Notes

### 2026-05-12 — Initial Architecture Review

- ✅ Separation of concerns: chat (Chats) and specs (Specs) are independent modules
- ✅ Backend state is persistent (JSON files in data dir)
- ⚠️  Need rate limiting on AI endpoints
- ⚠️  Error handling in streaming could be more robust

## Security Audit

| Check | Status | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| Input sanitization | ⚠️ | Markdown is rendered raw; need XSS filter |
| API auth | ❌ | No authentication yet |
| Session isolation | ✅ | Sessions stored by UUID, no cross-access |
| File path traversal | ✅ | `sanitize_filename` prevents directory escape |

## Action Items

1. Add Content Security Policy headers
2. Implement API key authentication
3. Sanitize markdown before rendering
4. Add request rate limiting

sections.title: 🔌 APIs
sections.content:
# APIs

## Authentication

All endpoints require a session cookie or API key header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <api_key>
```

## Endpoints

### Sessions

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/forge/chats/session` | List all sessions |
| POST | `/api/forge/chats/session` | Create new session |
| GET | `/api/forge/chats/session/{sid}` | Get session details |
| PATCH | `/api/forge/chats/session/{sid}` | Rename session |
| DELETE | `/api/forge/chats/session/{sid}` | Delete session |
| POST | `/api/forge/chats/session/{sid}/chat` | Send chat message |
| GET | `/api/forge/chats/session/{sid}/chat/stream` | Stream chat response |

### Specs

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/forge/specs/{project}` | Get specs document |
| POST | `/api/forge/specs/{project}/{section}` | Update section |
| POST | `/api/forge/specs/{project}` | Update full specs |

## Schemas

### ForgeSession

```json
{
  "id": "uuid-string",
  "name": "optional-session-name",
  "project_path": "/path/to/project",
  "status": "Idle | Active | Streaming",
  "phase": "Discovery | Spec | Code | Verify",
  "messages": [...],
  "created_at": 1715500000,
  "phase_history": [...]
}
```

### SpecsDocument

```json
{
  "project": "project-name",
  "version": 1,
  "sections": [
    {
      "id": "goals",
      "section_type": "goals",
      "title": "🎯 Goals",
      "status": "draft",
      "content": "# markdown content...",
      "depends_on": [],
      "last_modified": 1715500000,
      "last_verified": null
    }
  ]
}
```
